turns.name: read_file
turns.content:
# Pump test log
- 45 s per 80 mL swing at 12 V
- draw steady at 1.8 A, no stall events across 20 cycles
- prime lost once when the inlet ran dry
Read it - twenty clean cycles at a steady 1.8 A, the only hiccup was losing prime on a dry inlet. Pump's boring in the good way; watch the inlet.
